name: Tomato Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut off the tops of the tomatoes; scoop out the pulp.
2. Sprinkle the inside of each tomato shell lightly with salt and invert to drain.
3. Chop the tomato pulp.
4. In a skillet, sauté the green pepper and onion in melted butter until tender.
5. Add the chopped tomato pulp, cooked rice, beaten egg, oregano, basil, salt, shredded cheese, and crumbled bacon to the skillet. Mix well.
6. Fill each tomato shell with the rice mixture.
7. Sprinkle the reserved cheese and bacon on top of each filled tomato shell.
8. Place the tomatoes in a greased shallow baking dish and add a small amount of water.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
